title: bidens triplinervia
intro: Bidens triplinervia, also known as Three-nerved Beggar-ticks or Three-nerved Beggar Lice, is a plant species within the Bidens genus. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Bidens triplinervia is commonly used in herbal preparations, often in the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
